cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where each gift ends up after all these swaps. So, we have five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me list their starting gifts again to make sure I have them right. - Alice: brown present - Bob: orange ball - Claire: purple present - Dave: yellow present - Eve: white present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap step by step and track who has which gift after each exchange. First swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. So Bob, who had the orange ball, now gets Eve's white present. Eve, in turn, takes Bob's orange ball. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: white (from Eve) - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Second swap: Bob and Claire swap.
